Lichenclover  
 

Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.7 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Lichenclover
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.7 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:26:56
Page Updated:Fri Mar 5th, 2021

Expansion: Shadows of Luclin
Average Price: 42pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is found by foraging.

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a coerced goblin

Firiona Vie
NPC Name
a drolvarg growler
a drolvarg scavenger
froglok ton warrior

Frontier Mountains
NPC Name
a mountain giant tump
goblin raider - Frontier Mountains

Swamp of No Hope
NPC Name
a froglok ton warrior
froglok vis shaman

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Cabilis East
Quest Name
Claw of the Scout (#2)

East Karana
Quest Name
Druid Epic 1.5: Staff of Living Brambles
Used in 3 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crypt of Dalnir
Field of Scale
Firiona Vie
Frontier Mountains
Swamp of No Hope
The Field of Bone
Thuliasaur Island

# Aug 05 2012 at 1:03 PM Rating: Decent
bbq4tw
View User Forum
13 posts
Anyone know if this item is still able to be foraged in field of bone? Been trying for the past 2 hours and have yet to get it. Only reason I ask is because of some of the older comments saying they got one every other forage. Thanks.
▲ Page top
Forage in Field of Bone
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2016 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
DroconinEmpirious
View User Forum
15 posts
To anyone it concerns, This item is still foragable in FoB as of 3/14/16
____________________________
If the one I worship is god, then it is me. I am the only one that can forge my future.
▲ Page top
Re: Forage in Field of Bone
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2012 at 1:29 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1691367413219
Guru
2,689 posts
As of last year, it was still forage-able there. Every other attempt, is just a fluke. You're probably at the other end of such a fluke. It seems maybe uncommon at worse. It maybe classified as high skill item, where 100+ forage increases it forage rate, if that even still exists in game, as I've had no problem getting the Rng/Dru 1.0 epic forage items with 50 or less forage at very low levels. It seemed more frequent in FV to me, but that may be due to goblins dropping them; I don't remember for sure, since it's been so long.

Yther ore.

Clovers
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 5:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797878176
Guru
346 posts
Iwas soloing in FoB with my 14 Druid and everyother time I foraged I got one of these, I already have a stack. I see ppl here are talking about 45pp each, quick money for a Character this level, especially as my Druid is from the Stromm server. Anyone who's been to that servers bazaar recently will know what I mean.
▲ Page top
also used for......
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2003 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786266158
100 posts
dyes used in tailoring for different ribbons which eventually are used for the robes at higher trivials and cultural.


i have some of the ribbons for sale alot cheaper than they are to make on the MM server. they dont sell well...guess not many people are making the robes.

if you need some look for my trader usually at night EST....swiftarrow is the name
▲ Page top
they sell for big bucks!
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 6:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782003008
View User Forum
24 posts
well i have an iksar monk the RZ server and i had like at elast 10 stacks of these things and i went to the bazaar and they were selling for 45pp each! so imadently i went in trader mode and i came back the next moring and they were all sold!!!

# Dec 14 2003 at 4:32 PM Rating: Decent
Temperance
View User Forum
Scholar
514 posts
Got tired just hitting FORAGE in Firiona Vie, so I looked around.
Drolvarg Growlers have a fairly decent drop rate of Lichenclover!
I went to the Drolvarg Ruins on the east wall of FV for some fun.
Druid friend of mine had never been there, it was relaxing. =)
Aaah, the old days

Edited, Sun Dec 14 16:33:52 2003

# Sep 25 2004 at 3:24 PM Rating: Decent

21 posts
Just a quick follow up. After killing all over the zone, I found that only the Drolvargs in the ruins (mentioned by Temperance, above, on the east wall) seem to drop the lichenclover.

This item is now used in brewing to make the Racial Robe Dye for high elves.

Purified Water?
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 12:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760931097
109 posts
What is purified water used for?
▲ Page top
Purpose
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2001 at 9:12 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765380629
Scholar
22 posts
The Lichenclover, Moss Root, Water Reed, and Sop Bark are used with a purification tablet in a water extracter, and yields 3 purified waters.
▲ Page top

Foraged it in Dreadlands. Would Verant really include something in the game that was absolutely, totally, completely ... worthless?

__DEL__1593375035899

Orc Scalp, case closed...

Liveye (lvl 65 Wizard)
▲ Page top
RE: Lichenclover
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2004 at 1:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591811881786
Sage
690 posts
umm, orc scalps aren't worthless, they give freeport and HHK factions from turning them in to the captain on the orc side of high hold pass as well as a little money...good for newbies, buy them for 1 gold from other players, once you get enough make the journey to HHp and turn them in for 2.5gp each...did this a lot with my newbie on the stromm server for fun =)
▲ Page top
RE: Lichenclover
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2003 at 2:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766275047
